data.title: Modular Design
data.description: Microsoft.com utilizes a modular architecture to ensure the seamless integration of various products and services.
data.technical_spec: Microservices, RESTful APIs, containerization using Docker.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The website is hosted on Microsoft Azure, benefiting from cloud scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Azure Kubernetes Service, Azure CDN, serverless functions.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures optimal performance and user experience across all devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS flexbox, media queries, adaptive images.

data.title: Headless CMS
data.description: Content is managed and delivered independently of the frontend.

data.title: Scalable Networking
data.description: Utilizes state-of-the-art networking solutions for content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Load balancing, distributed databases, edge computing.
